title: opt_share generates invalid cells
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

```
read_verilog << EOF
module top(...);
input A1, A2, B, S;
output O;

assign O = S ? (A1 & B) : (A2 & B);

endmodule
EOF

simplemap
opt_share
dump
```

## Expected behavior

No crash.

## Actual behavior

`opt_share` generates a cell with parameters that should not be there:

```
3. Executing OPT_SHARE pass.
    Found cells that share an operand and can be merged by moving the $_MUX_ $auto$simplemap.cc:277:simplemap_mux$4 in front of them:
        $auto$simplemap.cc:85:simplemap_bitop$5
        $auto$simplemap.cc:85:simplemap_bitop$6

ERROR: Found error in internal cell \top.$auto$simplemap.cc:85:simplemap_bitop$5 ($_AND_) at kernel/rtlil.cc:822:
  attribute \src "t4.v:5"
  cell $_AND_ $auto$simplemap.cc:85:simplemap_bitop$5
    parameter \A_WIDTH 1
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 1
    connect \Y $and$t4.v:5$2_Y
    connect \B \B
    connect \A $auto$rtlil.cc:1919:Pmux$10
  end
```
code_blocks:
3. Executing OPT_SHARE pass.
    Found cells that share an operand and can be merged by moving the $_MUX_ $auto$simplemap.cc:277:simplemap_mux$4 in front of them:
        $auto$simplemap.cc:85:simplemap_bitop$5
        $auto$simplemap.cc:85:simplemap_bitop$6

ERROR: Found error in internal cell \top.$auto$simplemap.cc:85:simplemap_bitop$5 ($_AND_) at kernel/rtlil.cc:822:
  attribute \src "t4.v:5"
  cell $_AND_ $auto$simplemap.cc:85:simplemap_bitop$5
    parameter \A_WIDTH 1
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 1
    connect \Y $and$t4.v:5$2_Y
    connect \B \B
    connect \A $auto$rtlil.cc:1919:Pmux$10
  end
